title: Add M3 rest and sleep job slice
summary: Implement rest/sleep work selection and serializable sleep job drivers over M3 needs and environment context.
acceptance: Tired actors select rest through bounded indexed candidates and Top-K path resolution
Sleep/rest jobs are explicit serializable state machines with reservation cleanup and interruption policies
Rest recovery uses integer/fixed-point progress and stable scheduling
Failures and interruptions emit structured reasons for no rest spot path reservation ability schedule and emergency needs
Focused tests cover saveable job state deterministic recovery cancellation interruption and no reservation leaks

history.details: Created by WM-0045 M3 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Implemented M3 rest/sleep owner/index/job-driver slice with bounded indexed selection, Top-K path evidence, Q16 recovery, serializable driver snapshots, reservation cleanup, focused tests, docs, and report; required checks pass except pnpm test --filter m3-rest-sleep is unsupported and was replaced by direct focused Vitest plus supported broader gates.

changes_requested: High: denied sleep interruption mutates RestJobDriverStore terminalReason without a terminal transition; High: RestSleepReason accepts ReservationReason and arbitrary strings but encode/decode drops them to rest.none, breaking structured terminal reasons and snapshot round-trips; Medium: tickRecovery mutates JobCore/recovery progress before NeedStore denial, so invalid actor recovery leaves partial progress with reservations still active.

Repaired WM-0050 review findings: denied sleep interruptions no longer mutate driver state, reservation-specific reasons now round-trip through trace and snapshot serialization, and tickRecovery preflights need ownership before progress mutation; added regressions and reran typecheck, focused Vitest, sim-core test, taskctl validate/status, diff check, and pnpm quality.

verified: No blocking findings after repair; denied sleep interruption snapshots remain unchanged, reservation-specific reasons round-trip through trace and driver snapshots, and tickRecovery preflights need ownership before progress mutation. Focused and full gates pass.

objective: Add the first M3 life behavior job slice while preserving explicit JobCore-style state ownership.
forbiddenPaths: food eating medical mood relationship implementation
Promise Generator coroutine closure or UI-held job position
benchmarkImpact: Records rest candidate visits exact-path counts job duration interruption counts and reservation cleanup; baseline updates wait for WM-0059.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must review any job-driver or save-shape drift.
rollbackModel: Revert rest/sleep code tests docs and report; needs and environment owner stores remain if already integrated.
ownerGate: Use indexed candidate lookup and bounded Top-K pathing
Release reservations on every terminal path
Block on save protocol schema dependency UI authority or M4 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Serializable job-driver and deterministic simulation behavior are outside Spark scope.

review.summary: No blocking findings after repair; denied sleep interruption snapshots remain unchanged, reservation-specific reasons round-trip through trace and driver snapshots, and tickRecovery preflights need ownership before progress mutation. Focused and full gates pass.
